steps.title: Find the head noun
steps.content: The subject is The city of Quito in Ecuador. The head noun is city, which is singular; the prepositional phrases do not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Use singular present agreement
steps.content: Choice B uses plural have. Choice C and Choice D use plural are. The sentence states an ongoing fact about one city, so it needs the singular present-tense verb. The answer is A.
